author: claude
content: Tests landed in draft PR #1198 (branch test/adversarial-robustness): https://github.com/openwpm/OpenWPM/pull/1198 — 7 socket tests PASS, controller control+transient-recovery+malformed(SQLite) PASS, G1/G1b/G2 captured as xfail(strict), 3 browser-required tests skip on env-block (run in CI).
